channel.title: Ops Under Pressure
channel.description: Recent content on Ops Under Pressure

item.title: Architecting SAP HANA High Availability on AWS
item.description: Building a production-ready SAP HANA cluster using Pacemaker, AWS-integrated STONITH fencing, overlay IPs, quorum devices, and preload readiness validation.

item.title: The RHEL 5 Hyper-V Migration That Booted Straight Into Rescue Mode
item.description: A real-world RHEL 5 to Hyper-V migration story covering rescue mode, LVM activation, GRUB cleanup, initrd rebuilds, and Hyper-V driver surprises.

item.title: About
item.description:
About Ops Under Pressure

Welcome to Ops Under Pressure.

I’m Claudio Lombardo, a Principal IT Infrastructure Engineer supporting enterprise Linux, Windows, cloud platforms, databases, monitoring systems, automation, CI/CD pipelines, and high-availability architectures.

This site documents real-world production issues, root causes, lessons learned, and solutions that actually worked.

Topics include:

  • Linux / RHEL
  • Windows
  • AWS
  • Monitoring with Zabbix and Nagios
  • Automation
  • CI/CD
  • Enterprise Troubleshooting
  • AI-SRE
  • Security & Certificates

The goal is simple:
